name: Blackcurrant Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Set oven to 220°C/425°F/Gas Mark 7.
2. Line a 12-cup muffin tin with paper cake cases.
3. In a large bowl, mix together the flour, wheatgerm, baking powder, and salt.
4. Stir in the sugar until well combined.
5. Gradually add milk, stirring constantly until all ingredients are moistened.
6. Beat in the oil and beaten egg until you have a smooth batter.
7. Stir in the blackcurrants.
8. Spoon the mixture into the paper cases, filling almost to the top.
9. Bake for 18 to 20 minutes, or until the muffins are well risen, golden brown, and springy to the touch.
10. Allow to cool for a few minutes before removing from the tin.
